cases.mutation: Input never visits the comparator window.
Input visits below-window and inside-window regions but never rises above the upper threshold.
Input rises through the window and above the upper threshold but never returns through the window on the falling side.
Input starts inside the window and visits above-window, but never provides a below-window region.

cases.description: Window Comparator Testbench: preserves the DUT artifact and rising sweep but truncates the run before falling-window coverage.
